name: research
description: v1.1.2 - Agent-driven serious research and R&D workflows with lightweight audit and quant-finance specialization.

interface.shortDescription: Research and R&D protocols with quant finance specialization
interface.longDescription: v1.1.2 - Agent-driven serious research and R&D workflows with lighter tracking and audit requirements. The plugin exposes a generic research skill for disciplined R&D / Pure Research work, plus a quant-research adapter for financial machine learning, backtests, time-series validation, leakage checks, Sharpe/DSR review, transaction costs, and portfolio-oriented evidence.
